summary: Tier lists + Archon extras refreshed (18 moves); murlok/bloodmallet/SimC/mythicstats refreshed; WCL API reachable but rdps metric errors on every zone; 0 new PTR builds; creators 0 new takes

sources.detail: All 6 pages (raid+mplus, all roles) fetched live, era-verified Midnight S1/12.0.7; mplus MM Hunter/Devastation Evoker/Fire Mage C→B.
Both pages fetched; raid still omits Vengeance DH (upstream absence, not an error); Blood DK raid rated (unrated→B); mplus Resto Druid S→A, Mistweaver S→A.
All 6 pages fetched via r.jina.ai, era-verified; zero diffs vs prior snapshot (genuine no-movement, independently reconfirmed).
All 6 raid(throughput)/mplus(score) pages parsed from __NEXT_DATA__; zero diffs vs prior snapshot.
Full 9-boss + 8-dungeon refresh (prior run was sampled-only); 40 cell-level tier changes merged.

Page fetched fine but Archon's raid survivability tierList is genuinely empty (tiers: []) on all 3 raid pages, cross-checked against __NEXT_DATA__ and the _next/data endpoint — not a parse artifact. Existing 40-row data left untouched per never-guess rule; needs re-check next run.
mplus fully populated (raid still unranked upstream, as always); 12 of 40 specs moved (Discipline Priest C→A is the only 2-band move); anti-off-by-one anchors held.

GraphQL OAuth+transport now reachable (browser UA on token POST; Origin/Referer/sec-ch-ua on the client POST clears Cloudflare), but characterRankings(metric: rdps) throws Internal server error on zone 46 encounter 3176 (dps/hps/default metrics work but would misrepresent the rDPS-labeled series, so not substituted); data left unchanged.
Same rdps-metric Internal server error confirmed on zone 47 encounter 112526; data left unchanged.
Zone 54 (all 3 role cuts) hits the identical rdps-metric Internal server error; data left unchanged at 2026-07-09 baseline (DPS 27/Healers 7/Tanks 6).
Zone 56 (DPS/tank/healer cuts) hits the identical rdps-metric Internal server error; data left unchanged at 2026-07-09 baseline.
Zone 52 (4 boss ids) hits the identical rdps-metric Internal server error, confirmed directly on encounter 3591; data left unchanged at 2026-07-09 baseline (27 specs).
40/40 rows (27 DPS + 7 healer + 6 tank) fetched live, era-verified; all values byte-identical to prior snapshot (confirmed stable, not a stale skip).

25/27 DPS profiles fetched, MID1/PTR:0 confirmed; Augmentation absent by design, Elemental Shaman still has no upstream chart (kept last-known 2026-07-01 profile); rest byte-identical to prior snapshot.
Fresh nightly MID1 raid report fetched (WoW 12.0.7.68453, hotfix 07-13); 26/26 DPS specs, modest ~1-2.5% shifts applied as real update.
40/40 rows via /period/latest (period 1071); role-subtotal sum re-verified at 100%; 2026-07-08 semantic-drift flag independently re-checked and confirmed resolved.
Forum thread still tops out at post #13 (2026-07-09, PvP-only); 5 new Wowhead RSS items this cycle, all non-tuning (Classic+, SoD, testing-schedule announcement, lore) — 0 new builds.

24/24 creator feeds polled; 2 new videos found, both title-filtered out as off-topic; 0 takes/metaNotes added; 4 videos carried over as pending (datacenter IP blocked) for local catch-up; community.json latest fields already current.
